title: Rolling and Dished End Manufacturer
content:
Fabtech International is one of the leading manufacturers and supplier of dished end and rolling service in Dubai. We retain an appreciable position in the market due to the support of our trained and diligent workforce and loyal customers. Our team consists of some of the best talents in the world. Chosen based on stern eligibility criteria, they help us in completing bulk orders by the assured span of time. With precision and attention to detail, we offer end products in standard and modified forms to our clients. Following our norms and standards, our product range varies according to the need and requirement of clients.
Our extensive catalogue entails dished ends of various types, sizes, and specifications, which can be tailored to our customer’s preferences. We offer dished end production line, which includes technologically advanced equipment to offer utmost reliability and flexibility. To learn to contact our team of experts today!
Fabtech’s dishing facility is managed by specialized and experienced technicians and is well equipped with modern equipment. It’s where dishes are made by pressing and spinning. As experts in dish end manufacturing, we take pride in our complete set of quality guarantee system coupled with our highly competent workforce. We use both cold forming and hot forming – we are a professional manufacturer and specialize in the production of crown and petal construction, ellipsoidal dished heads and spheres.
The machinery used at our manufacturing unit is completely automated to ensure the high-quality end product and tolerance limit. We acquire techniques and technology to suit the needs of our customers. An added advantage is our jetty facility responsible for meeting the significant export requirement.
Our wide selection of crown dished heads can be used for various purposes like as storage tanks, boilers, and heat exchangers. They are high on durability with their inbuild premium quality materials.
With sheer consideration for the varied desires and requirements of our clients, we are popular in manufacturing a wide selection of petal dished heads. Our products are unique due to their reliability, durability, precision and fine finishing.
We adopt a cold and hot forming process which allows us to design the product per customers’ requirement and also adheres to the highest level of international standards.
We offer sphere dished heads in prominent sizes and dimensions. Using our refined machinery and equipment, we can manufacture these in virtuous quality and quantity.
Our welding operation is fully automated and uses the most advances and safe technology. Used by our experienced coded welders of SMAW, GTAW, and GMAW & SMAW along with ferrous and non-ferrous, stainless steel and clad steel. The primary focus is to ensure the electrodes are of high quality at every stage.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
